project.name: TILDA - Administrative Boundaries
project.description: TILDA processes administrative boundary relations from OpenStreetMap data to define planning regions for bicycle infrastructure.

tags.description: Entry condition: identifies boundary relations for processing.
Entry condition: identifies administrative boundaries for processing.
Determines boundary level for municipality (Kreisfreie Städte, Stadtstaaten).
Determines boundary level for district (Kreise, Kreisfreie Städte).
Population data for the administrative area.
